incline-pushups.title: Incline Push-Ups
incline-pushups.description: A beginner-friendly push-up variation focusing on chest activation with reduced load.
steps: Place hands on an elevated surface like a bench.
Keep your body straight from head to heels.
Lower yourself slowly until chest nears the surface.
Push back up while keeping core tight.
safety: Keep core engaged to avoid lower back sagging.

plank.title: Plank
plank.description: An isometric core exercise focusing on stability and endurance.
steps: Place forearms on the ground under shoulders.
Keep body in a straight line.
safety: Stop if you feel lower back pain.

standard-pushups.title: Standard Push-Ups
standard-pushups.description: A fundamental upper-body exercise targeting chest, shoulders, and triceps.
steps: Place hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Keep body in a straight line.
Push back up while keeping core tight.

pike-pushups.title: Pike Push-Ups
pike-pushups.description: A vertical pressing movement emphasizing shoulder development.
steps: Start in a pike position with hips elevated.

bench-dips.title: Bench Dips
steps: Place hands on a bench behind you.

body-weight-squats-slow.title: Bodyweight Squats
body-weight-squats-slow.description: A foundational lower-body movement focusing on control and depth.

reverse-lunges.title: Reverse Lunges
reverse-lunges.description: A unilateral leg exercise improving balance and strength.

hip-thrusts.title: Hip Thrusts
hip-thrusts.description: A glute-dominant exercise focusing on hip extension.

inverted-rows-bent-knees.title: Inverted Rows (Bent Knees)
inverted-rows-bent-knees.description: A beginner pulling exercise targeting the upper back.
steps: Hold a bar with bent knees.

chin-ups.title: Chin-Ups
chin-ups.description: A compound pulling movement emphasizing biceps and lats.
steps: Grip bar with palms facing you.

bulgarian-split-squats.title: Bulgarian Split Squats
bulgarian-split-squats.description: A unilateral lower-body exercise with high hypertrophy potential.

diamond-push-ups.title: Diamond Push-Ups
diamond-push-ups.description: A push-up variation emphasizing triceps activation.

wall-sit.title: Wall Sit
safety: Do not let knees cave in.

jumping_jacks.title: Jumping Jacks
jumping_jacks.description: A full-body warm-up movement increasing heart rate.

hamstring-stretch.title: Hamstring Stretch
hamstring-stretch.description: A stretch targeting the back of the legs.

standing-calf-raises-slow.title: Standing Calf Raises (Slow)
standing-calf-raises-slow.description: A controlled calf exercise focusing on full range of motion and time under tension.
steps: Stand upright with feet hip-width apart.
Raise your heels slowly to stand on your toes.
Lower your heels slowly back down.
safety: Use support if balance is an issue.

towel-curls.title: Towel Bicep Curls
towel-curls.description: An isometric curl using a towel for resistance, great for bicep activation without weights.
steps: Stand on a towel and hold both ends.
Pull upward as if performing a curl.
Resist with your legs to create tension.

scapular-pulls.title: Scapular Pull-Ups
scapular-pulls.description: A foundational pulling movement focusing on scapular control and shoulder stability.
steps: Hang from a bar with arms fully extended.
Pull your shoulder blades down and back.
Lift your body slightly without bending arms.

push-ups-slow-negatives.title: Push-Ups (Slow Negatives)
push-ups-slow-negatives.description: A push-up variation emphasizing slow eccentric control to build strength.

hollow-body-hold.title: Hollow Body Hold
hollow-body-hold.description: A core stability exercise focusing on full-body tension and control.
steps: Lie on your back with arms overhead.
Lift shoulders and legs off the ground.
Press lower back into the floor.
safety: Do not arch your lower back.

decline-push-ups.title: Decline Push-Ups
decline-push-ups.description: An advanced push-up variation increasing upper chest and shoulder demand.
steps: Place feet on an elevated surface.

pseudo-planche-push-ups.title: Pseudo Planche Push-Ups
pseudo-planche-push-ups.description: A forward-leaning push-up variation targeting shoulders and planche strength.
steps: Lean forward with hands near hips.
Keep elbows close to your body.

elevated-pike-push-ups.title: Elevated Pike Push-Ups
elevated-pike-push-ups.description: A shoulder-focused push-up progressing toward handstand push-ups.
steps: Place feet on an elevated surface.

inverted-rows-straight-legs.title: Inverted Rows (Straight Legs)
inverted-rows-straight-legs.description: A horizontal pulling exercise emphasizing upper back strength.
steps: Lie under a bar with legs straight.

tempo-squats.title: Tempo Squats (Slow Air Squats)
tempo-squats.description: A bodyweight squat performed slowly to increase time under tension.

single-leg-hip-thrusts-left.title: Single Leg Hip Thrust (Left)
single-leg-hip-thrusts-left.description: A unilateral glute exercise improving strength and stability.
steps: Place upper back on a bench.
Keep left foot planted, right leg raised.

single-leg-hip-thrusts-right.title: Single Leg Hip Thrust (Right)
single-leg-hip-thrusts-right.description: A unilateral glute exercise improving strength and stability.
steps: Place upper back on a bench.
Keep right foot planted, left leg raised.

single-leg-calf-raises-left.title: Single Leg Calf Raises (Left)
single-leg-calf-raises-left.description: A unilateral calf exercise to build strength and balance.

single-leg-calf-raises-right.title: Single Leg Calf Raises (Right)
single-leg-calf-raises-right.description: A unilateral calf exercise to build strength and balance.

pike-holds.title: Pike Holds
pike-holds.description: An isometric hold that strengthens the shoulders and core in a pike position.
steps: Start in a pike position with hips elevated.
Keep arms straight and shoulders active.
Engage your core and hold the position.
safety: Keep core engaged to protect lower back.

walking_lunges.title: Walking Lunges
walking_lunges.description: A dynamic lower-body movement that improves balance, coordination, and leg strength.
steps: Step forward into a lunge position.
Lower until both knees are bent at 90 degrees.
Push through the front heel to step forward.
Alternate legs as you move forward.
safety: Keep front knee aligned with toes.

knee_tucks.title: Knee Tucks
knee_tucks.description: A core-focused movement that activates the abs while improving coordination.
steps: Start in a plank or seated position.
Bring your knees toward your chest.
Engage your core throughout the movement.
Return to the starting position and repeat.
safety: Avoid rounding your lower back excessively.

leg_swings.title: Leg Swings
leg_swings.description: A dynamic stretch to loosen hips and improve mobility.
steps: Swing one leg forward and backward.

side_lunges.title: Side Lunges
side_lunges.description: A lateral movement that improves hip mobility and inner thigh strength.
steps: Shift weight into the bent leg.

butt_kicks.title: Butt Kicks
butt_kicks.description: A cardio warm-up exercise that activates hamstrings and increases heart rate.
steps: Kick heels up toward your glutes.
safety: Avoid excessive arching of the back.

arm_circles_normal_counter.title: Arm Circles (Normal Counter Clockwise)
arm_circles_normal_counter.description: A shoulder warm-up exercise to improve mobility and blood flow.
steps: Extend arms out to the sides.

arm_circles_large_clockwise.title: Arm Circles (Large Clockwise)
arm_circles_large_clockwise.description: A dynamic shoulder exercise focusing on large controlled circular motions.
steps: Extend arms out to the sides.

arm_circles_large_counter.title: Arm Circles (Large Counter Clockwise)
arm_circles_large_counter.description: A shoulder mobility exercise using large counter-clockwise arm circles.

Seated-Back-Twist.title: Seated Back Twist
Seated-Back-Twist.description: A static stretch to improve spinal mobility and relieve tension in the back.
steps: Cross one leg over the other.
Twist your torso toward the bent knee.

Quad-Stretch.title: Quad Stretch
Quad-Stretch.description: A classic stretch to lengthen the quadriceps and improve flexibility.
steps: Stand upright holding support if needed.

Hip-Abductor-Stretch.title: Hip Abductor Stretch
Hip-Abductor-Stretch.description: A stretch targeting the outer hips to improve mobility and reduce tightness.
steps: Stand or sit with legs apart.
Shift your weight to one side.
Feel the stretch along the outer hip.

Hamstring-Stretch.title: Hamstring Stretch
Hamstring-Stretch.description: A classic stretch to improve flexibility in the back of the legs.
safety: Do not bounce during the stretch.

Lat-Stretches.title: Lat Stretches
Lat-Stretches.description: A stretch to loosen the lat muscles and improve upper body mobility.
steps: Feel the stretch along your side.

Glute-Stretches.title: Glute Stretches
Glute-Stretches.description: A stretch to release tension in the glutes and hips.
steps: Cross one ankle over the opposite knee.
Pull the leg toward your chest.

Calf-Stretches.title: Calf Stretches
Calf-Stretches.description: A stretch to improve flexibility in the calves and ankles.
steps: Press the heel into the ground.

Lying-Abdominal-Stretches.title: Lying Abdominal Stretches
Lying-Abdominal-Stretches.description: A gentle stretch for the abdominal muscles and front of the body.
steps: Press your hands into the floor.

Neck-Side-Bend.title: Neck Side Bend
Neck-Side-Bend.description: A gentle stretch to relieve tension in the neck.
steps: Tilt your head to one side.
Use your hand for gentle pressure.

Shoulder-Stretch.title: Shoulder Stretch
Shoulder-Stretch.description: A stretch to improve shoulder flexibility and reduce tightness.
steps: Bring one arm across your body.
Use the opposite hand to hold it.
safety: Do not force the arm across.

Triceps-Stretch.title: Triceps Stretch
Triceps-Stretch.description: A stretch targeting the triceps and upper arm.
steps: Bend the elbow so your hand reaches your back.
Use the other hand to gently press the elbow.

archer-push-ups.title: Archer Push-Ups
archer-push-ups.description: An advanced push-up variation emphasizing unilateral chest and arm strength.
steps: Start in a wide push-up position.
Shift weight to one side while lowering.
Push back up and alternate sides.

deep-push-ups.title: Deep Push-Ups
deep-push-ups.description: A push-up variation with increased range of motion for greater chest stretch.

handstand-push-up.title: Handstand Push-Ups
handstand-push-up.description: A vertical pressing movement targeting shoulders with full bodyweight.
steps: Kick up into a handstand against a wall.

triceps-extensions.title: Bodyweight Triceps Extensions
triceps-extensions.description: An isolation movement targeting the triceps using bodyweight.
steps: Place hands on a stable surface.
Lower head forward by bending elbows.

pull-ups.title: Pull-Ups
pull-ups.description: A fundamental upper-body pulling exercise focusing on back strength.
steps: Grip bar with palms facing away.

archer-rows.title: Archer Rows
archer-rows.description: A unilateral rowing movement increasing back and arm strength.
steps: Hold a low bar or rings.

ring-bicep-curls.title: Ring Bicep Curls
ring-bicep-curls.description: A ring-based curl targeting biceps through bodyweight resistance.

dead-hangs.title: Dead Hangs
dead-hangs.description: A passive hang improving grip strength and shoulder health.

nordic-hamstring-negatives.title: Nordic Hamstring Negatives
nordic-hamstring-negatives.description: A highly effective eccentric exercise for hamstring development.

ring-push-up.title: Ring Push-Ups
ring-push-up.description: An unstable push-up variation increasing muscle activation.

step-ups.title: Step-Ups
step-ups.description: A functional lower-body exercise improving strength and balance.
safety: Avoid pushing off the back leg.
